'''[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Gris Manks''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of artillery for the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]]. During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], he and his artillery units supported Jedi [[Nejaa Halcyon]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. When Slaykes and contingent of clone troopers were retreating, Gris opened the barrage too soon, which he and [[Green Wizard|CT-19/39]] were killed.
